The hide and seek game is one of my favorite multiplayer oculus games. It's so fun and cute with the voices and art. I would love more map options.

The game is poo
I HATE THIS GAME!!!!!!!
Most boring game I have ever downloaded.
Overall a great game but loading up takes so long

This is the most wholesome game, I’ve had the sweetest little interactions with other players! High-fiving, patty cakes, and even hugs! I love getting peoples attention by saying anything because all they hear is cute little “lalala!”s. The only thing I would want in this game is more maps for the hide n seek game mode, even if it seems like it always changes! This game is the cutest, please consider inviting friends because this underrated game needs way more players!

Great way to connect with family through some free mini games. Launch , get through the intro, press the indented menu button on the left controller and invite your friends and family. They pop up with smiley faces and wibbly wobbly arms and all of you go off on a mini adventure. Each mini game lasts about 5 mins and they can all be done sitting. It’s not a massive game, it’s a playroom environment for exploring VR experiences together. Hide and seek is especially fun. Enjoy.

Hide and seek if my favorite game. I wish they would add some more hiding areas. Maybe as an in game purchase. The gliding/flying stuff is okay but a bit boring. The music game is also alright.  I think it’s incredible that this game is free. I would totally pay for add-ons or for more fleshed out versions of the games they artlessly offer.
It was giving me motion sickness and hurts my arms
Terrible game. Don’t download, it pretty boring and is not fun.
So boring and pointless- little instruction on what to do. Huge waste of time

reviews.review_title: Alright game, but there’s not many ppl.
reviews.review_description: The game is okay but every time I  play hide and seek there’s only Like 1 person playing. :/

Can any one please tell me. How to understand other players on this app/game using an Oculus Quest  when I put my hand up to my mouth with one of the controllers i see this : x <<< in a circlelike two eyes with an x over a mouth. I like the game and it has interesting games within in it. But until I figure that out all I hear other players saying is and I quote "la la la la la la lalalalalalalalala" It might be more interesting and I would be able to rate this better with stars if I knew how to understand other players using an Oculus Quest. Does any one know how to fix this problem? To the developers it would be something if I can point and trigger shoot the mouth to turn on and off the audio of other players rather then just here " lalalalalalalah" from other players.

I really like it very good game and cute graphics but the only thing is you should make bigger servers because most of the time I play alone it is still a really cool
Game though:D

The world is really aesthetically pleasing as well as the sound track (though simple and repetitive I like it). My absolute favorite games in half half are StarBall and Hide and Seek. I spent a good couple hours playing the first time. A MUST TRY. literally nothing to lose.

Although I do wish there were a few more mini games, and a way to customize your color to a personal favorite, I really enjoy this game! The only thing I dislike is the lack of ability to voice chat- or at least from what I’ve seen.
So cool
A lot of fun when you play together with your friends. Definitely recommend to try, thanks for sharing it for free! It could be Fall Guys replacement for VR. Well done!

The games are simple but super stylish & fun! Really a true game design FREE gem 🙌
Keep up the good work guys!

So, all of the games are fun and so relaxing, smooth, and just plain funny. Also, i have noticed, that most people playing Hide + Seek don't know that you have to collect the orbs to win (team with the most orbs win). Also, I would love if you added more games and stuff.

I have a problem with the mirror, like it won't show anything, so if it does something, someone please tell me. Thanks!
This game has a really cute atmosphere, and there is no pressure to talk to teammates in games because everyone talks gibberish!

This game is amazing. It's not just a VR port of a PC style game. It fully utilizes the abilities of a VR setup, and makes it feel good. The experience it brings is enjoyable, and good for your mood. It's set out in an almost arcade kind of a way, which makes it super easy to hop into any game you want, each of which has been carefully crafted to provide a beautiful user experience. Even the character design is revolutionary, and it's hard to not find other players friendly (not that they try, everyone just waves at each other frantically in an excited fashion before a game starts).

Phenomenal. I can't wait to see what's in store for the future of Half + Half.
Brown
This game is absolutely funny and fun definitely recommend it
Im currently downloading it but I was wondering whether or not I can play with a friend who's on the rift or the rift s when im on the quest?

reviews.review_title: Annoying bug causes really awful loud sc
reviews.review_description:
Hello! I know my previous review was about annoying trollers, as j previously thought that was the cause of the screeching since then i have figured out for whatever reason that whenever the mic activates in game it creates a loud feedback loop that is not fun to hear.
I hope the devs fix this as this game has potential to be a fun game
Y’all should get this game. I don’t want to spoil it, but I’ll just say 1. It’s fun 2. You need other people 3. Please please play this
Half + Half’s “Hide + Seek” game is the cutest and most heartwarming game I’ve ever played in VR. I’m so happy I gave it a try because now it’s easily one of my favorites.
